scope: Introduces the book's central spectrum (dirancang manusia → dipelajari mesin).
key_concepts: The continuum of feature engineering: from fully human-crafted to fully machine-learned.
Representasi yang dirancang manusia (designed by human): explicit logic, formulas, domain knowledge injected by humans.
Representasi yang dipelajari mesin (learned by machine): models automatically extracting useful representations from raw data (e.g., embeddings in deep learning).
This spectrum is the organizing principle of the whole book.

definitions.definition: Features created through explicit human logic and domain expertise.
Features implicitly extracted by an algorithm during the learning process without explicit human instruction.

examples: Designed: A human creates a 'Body Mass Index (BMI)' feature from height and weight.
Learned: A Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) learns internally to detect edges and textures from raw pixels.

relations.builds_toward: The global structure of the book (Parts II-III are designed, Parts IV-V transition to learned).

exclusions: Do not drop the words 'manusia' or 'mesin' from the key terms.
